violations.text: Milk was observed held at 52 degrees Fahrenheit in the ice bath at the snack bar. Ice bath was observed with insufficient ice. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per person in charge, the milk was placed in the ice bath under 2 hours prior to inspection. Milk moved to refrigeration to rapidly cool. Milk and all TCS foods to now be kept in refrigeration for service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was moved to the ware-washing area to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Soup was observed held at 131 degrees Fahrenheit on the rolling cart in the front snack bar. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Person in charge elected to dispose of soup at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Soup was observed held at 53 degrees Fahrenheit on a rolling cart in the front snack bar. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per staff, soup was placed on the cart under an hour prior to inspection. PIC elected to dispose of foods at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
Potatoes were observed with a date mark exceeding the 7 days mark. PIC voluntarily disposed of by person in charge. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025

Inspector observed a cart with dirty dishes, utensils, and bucket of dumped soup being stored in walk in cooler.PIC removed cart from walk in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023
The following equipment was observed in poor repair: 1.door skirts for walk in freezer were ripped. 2.observed leak(sink and pipes connect) at the prep sink. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2023
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023

The ceilings throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023
